column1: # SEPIA — per-sample coverage: realized (current, from committed data) vs published genome-wide
# Computed 2026-07-23 from data/<sample>_depth.txt; published coverage verified from source papers
# (see plan/papers/REFERENCES.md). Realized = mean depth over the 222 panel positions.
# CAVEATS:
#  1. Realized depths are at the panel's CURRENT (hg38) mis-located coordinates (bug A2) -> depths at
#     WRONG positions, not true per-locus coverage. True per-locus coverage comes after the rebuild (Q6).
#  2. Denisova3's 0.495x is ARTIFACTUALLY low (chr-naming bug A1); its published coverage is ~30x.
#  3. max >> mean (Vindija87, Scladina) = pileup artifact -> motivates the max-depth cap.
#  4. Realized panel mean can differ from published genome-wide coverage (panel positions are not a random
#     genome sample, and artifacts inflate the mean). Q6 compares the two per sample.
#  5. High-coverage genomes (Tier A) will be taken from the published snpAD genotype VCFs, not re-called
#     (plan/papers/VCF_QC.md); low-coverage (Tier B) -> ANGSD genotype likelihoods from BAMs.
# sample        realized_mean_panel_depth  max  covered/222  tier   published_wg_cov (paper)
vindija33       30.716   106  222/222   A-high   ~30x (Pruefer 2017)
Chagyrskaya8    27.423   85   222/222   A-high   ~27-28x (Mafessoni 2020)
den25           16.680   48   183/222   A-high   ~24x (Peyregne 2025, PREPRINT)
den5            16.059   36   222/222   A-high   ~52x (Pruefer 2014, Altai)   # realized << published: check in Q6
vindija87       3.185    147  122/222   B-low    ~1.3x (Hajdinjak 2018; = Vi33.19 individual)
lesCottes       2.941    51   142/222   B-low    ~2.7x (Hajdinjak 2018)
goyet           2.464    54   163/222   B-low    ~2.2x (Hajdinjak 2018)
Sclad           1.856    91   64/222    B-low    ~0.02-0.03x / 78 Mbp (Peyregne 2019, EARLY ~120ka)
denny           1.252    20   121/222   B-low    ~2.6x (Slon 2018, Denisova 11 F1 hybrid)
spy             0.743    22   75/222    B-low    ~1.0x (Hajdinjak 2018)
Denisova3       0.495    6    69/222    ARTIFACT ~30x (Meyer 2012) -- true high-cov, mis-recovered (A1)
mez1            0.180    2    37/222    B-low    ~1.9x (Pruefer 2017 added; Prufer 2014 orig) -- low-cov snpAD VCF EXISTS (.../Vindija/VCF/Mez1/)
hst             0.117    2    24/222    B-low    ~0.05x / 168 Mbp (Peyregne 2019, EARLY ~120ka)
Sid1253         EMPTY    -    0/0       excluded exome-only ~12.5x over exome (Castellano 2014); no shotgun genome
